'''Municipal patrol droid Mark I''' was a droid designed by [[Automata Galactica/Legends|Automata Galactica]] as a law enforcement assistant for urban environments. It was also a popular way to boost firepower without adding personnel among private security companies and wealthy individuals. Even though small, Municipal Patrol Droid Mark I included more firepower than the average patrol droid.

==History==
During the [[Jedi Civil War]], these droids were massively produced by the [[Star Forge]] and used by the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]] to reinforce the [[Sith trooper (Sith Empire)|Sith troopers]] on the conquered worlds. They were reprogrammed to no longer require a living officer's authorization to fire, which made them extremely dangerous during a conflict.
